summary: An NBC News Now sit-down interview in which Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons recounts learning about the Dallas ICE facility shooting, intercut with aerial b-roll of the scene. It is a straightforward broadcast news interview, not a produced or music-driven spectacle.
notable_text: NBC NEWS; 'BREAKING NEWS — ACTING ICE DIRECTOR ON DALLAS ICE FACILITY SHOOTING'; 'TODD LYONS ACTING ICE DIRECTOR'
